The Indian Premier League (IPL) is a professional cricket league in India, organized by the IPL Governing Council. It is a domestic, annual Twenty20 cricket tournament, featuring several teams, including the Mumbai Indians and Chennai Super Kings, which are the most successful teams in the league's history with five titles each. The league has become one of the biggest events on the cricketing circuit, with a large following and extensive media coverage.
